chinese_news.title: 与近10家整机厂达成合作，专注打造航空电推进“中国心”，「羽嘉动力」连续完成两轮融资｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

当低空经济从政策概念走向产业化落地，一场关于“动力心脏”的落地卡位战也在悄然展开。

36氪获悉，航空电推进系统研制商羽嘉动力科技（常州）有限公司（以下简称“羽嘉动力”）近日宣布连续完成天使+、天使++两轮融资，累计金额数千万元，投资方包括益华投资、元禾控股、常高新、常金控，所筹资金将主要用于技术研发、人才队伍补充和产线扩建。加上去年7月完成的天使轮，羽嘉动力在不到一年的时间内完成了近亿元融资。

羽嘉动力成立于2024年2月，致力于为中大型电动航空器和特种装备提供轻量化、高可靠、性能卓越的“中国心”。公司创始人刘业本硕博均就读于南京航空航天大学电气工程专业，公司核心创始团队成员多来自国内头部院校及知名航空院所，在航空电推进系统领域拥有超过十年的研发与产业化实践经验。

当前国内外航空电气化正处于加速发展阶段，呈现出多电并进、技术迭代与市场扩容并行的鲜明趋势。

据不完全统计，截至2023年，全球范围内已有超过50家初创企业和航空公

chinese_news.title: 03年创始人造火箭，40万做出原型发动机，选了一条没人走过的路｜产业专访
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

执宇航天创始人张子瀚看起来不像一个还在读大学的本科生。

他说话语速略快，不苟言笑，气质有些老练，习惯用三段式推演的方式来回答问题：先给结论，再拆解前提和路线，最后补充例外或风险。

用张子瀚自己的话说，他是一个“几乎百分百理性的人，没有任何感性因素去参与我的任何决策”。

这种气质和航天领域有着天然的契合，极度理性、高度自省、目标驱动。但作为闯入这个赛道的异类创业者，他身上又有着天然的矛盾点——过于年轻、没有“背景”、不拘传统。

小学二年级参加航模国赛获一等奖、初一在自己的实验室用化学药剂合成固体燃料、高二通过自学自考拿到5门全A提前完成学业，大二在深圳的一间共享办公室里写完执宇航天的创业计划，张子瀚正式开始创业——这一年，他刚满21岁。

外界会用“天才少年”来形容张子瀚，但他不太喜欢，因为标签简化了叙事，而过度标签化之后，带来的往往是噪音。

chinese_news.title: 万科最值钱的资产浮出水面
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

从王石辟谣“被抓”，到今年一季度持续亏损、瘦身，拟32.7亿元转让环山集团股权，进入2026年的万科，依旧深陷舆论漩涡。

风波不断的背景下，普洛斯再度赴港IPO的传闻对当下的万科来说可算是一个利好消息。

此前据多家媒体援引消息人士称，全球物流及新型基础设施巨头普洛斯（GLP）计划最快于今年第二季度向港交所递交上市申请。此次IPO目标集资额不少于10亿美元，公司目标估值约达200亿美元。

尽管普洛斯官方对上市传闻表示“不予置评”，不过若能成功登陆联交所，一方面普洛斯可借此一举回报投资人；另一方面，一直化险攻坚的万科，也可借助这个“退出窗口”缓解资金压力，或是凭此获得新的估值支撑。

实际上，万科当前A+H股总市值约460亿元（截至5月11日），折合美元约67亿元，按普洛斯200亿美元的目标估值，万科手中的股权价值约42.8亿美元，已占其总市值的63.9%<

chinese_news.title: 30万亿细胞迷宫里寻路，MIT博士7年跑出一家上市公司
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 胡香赟

编辑 | 海若镜

5月13日，招股书秘交三个多月后，37岁的赖才达带领剂泰科技登陆港交所。开盘上涨170%，上市首日收涨127%，市值超270亿港币。

在这位带着几分书生气的麻省理工学院(MIT)化工博士背后，站着贝莱德、瑞银、国新基金、高瓴等基石投资机构，香港公开发售环节超购6900倍。

从成立到IPO，剂泰科技用了七年时间。2019年，晶泰科技内部筹备孵化剂泰科技，由时任执行COO赖才达牵头。他与晶泰科技联合创始人温书豪渊源颇深，两人博士都毕业于MIT。温书豪曾向投资人推荐称：“Chris(赖才达)和我有点像，但能力在我之上。”彼时，晶泰科技的估值已近10亿美元。

过去七年间，中国创新药赛道大起大落，2020年市场狂热，一批尝试用算法颠覆新药分子设计的AI制药公司拿到融资；短短两三年后，多家曾站在风口的明星公司，因管线数据不及预期、资金链断裂而倒下；而就在寒风刺骨时，新药BD浪潮、AI能力质变又为行业带来暖风。

周期剧变，一步踏空都可能功亏一篑。赖才达带

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 九号领投一家AI智能影像设备公司，在巨头夹缝中年增长近4倍
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，智能体育影像品牌「XbotGo」（深眸远智）于近期完成近亿元的新一轮融资。由九号资本领投，元禾控股、不同资本跟投，老股东零一创投超额跟投，云岫资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

在青少年体育运动文化发达的美国，体育不仅仅是竞技，更是家庭生活的核心。相关数据显示，美国有超过3000万青少年参与专业体育训练，美国家庭每周花在孩子体育活动上的时间平均高达10小时。

然而，一个长期困扰家长的痛点是：在赛场上的手动拍摄，不仅让家长无法沉浸式享受比赛的“即时情绪价值”，更由于距离远、目标小、场面复杂，很难精准捕捉到精彩的瞬时影像和运动数据。

XbotGo的创业缘起也来源于，创始人兼CEO谈科峰数年陪孩子踢球的经历，让其意识到体育活动中存在的拍摄问题和市场机遇。基于此，XbotGo的产品旨在解决体育活动拍摄问题，为用户提供自动拍摄设备捕捉体育赛场影像和数据，并通过AI帮助用户分析数据、拆解数据，最终能够全自动生成内容来解决体育活

chinese_news.title: 独家对谈｜林琳：一位耶鲁MBA裸辞转行卖保险之后
chinese_news.summary:
图源：公众号「职场Bonus」（ID：ZhiChangHongLi）

林琳有着外人眼中“光鲜”的履历：中国人民大学本科、耶鲁大学MBA，从一级市场与二级市场投研起步，深耕企业咨询培训近十年。

35岁后，这位履历光鲜的女孩跨界切入财富管理赛道，成为一名保险代理人。

她很少向外人提起，自己曾经历两次裸辞，一年空窗期里几度陷入迷茫。

如今，她用“中年觉醒”形容自己的状态——“做成啥样都可以，允许一切发生”。我们想结合她的职业经历与深度对话，拆解一位高学历职场人在35+阶段的转型逻辑，以及她对“

chinese_news.title: 2026 AI最佳场景渗透案例重磅揭晓
chinese_news.summary:
如果用一个词来描述当下的AI产业，“落地”已有些过时，“渗透”则更为准确。

“渗透”意味着AI不再是发布会上的炫技Demo，也不再是PPT里的概念模型，而是像水电煤一样，悄无声息地融入企业运营的毛细血管和用户日常的消费决策中。

据麦肯锡《2025 AI应用现状调研》报告显示，在国内大模型的快速崛起推动下，生成式AI已广泛渗透至企业运营中，83%的企业在至少一个职能中实现了常态化使用，这一比例显著领跑全球。更关键

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump-Xi summit produce a trade truce extension by 2026-06-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump-Xi summit underway in Beijing (2026-05-05 to 2026-05-06) with explicit trade, tech, and Taiwan agenda; market pricing uncertainty on durability of any agreement.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC reports summit covers trade, tech export controls, Taiwan; CoinDesk notes Bitcoin/Solana drops on Xi Taiwan warning; Nvidia H200 clearance already signaling potential thaw.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kevin Warsh's first act as Fed chair include a rate cut before 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Warsh just won Senate confirmation (most divisive vote ever for a Fed chair per CNBC); market pricing his hawkish vs dovish lean is live; outcome directly affects bond yields and crypto risk appetite.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC confirms Warsh confirmation; bond markets bracing for UK political turmoil (Starmer rivals) suggests rate sensitivity across G7.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC currently below $80k (CoinDesk reports drop on Xi Taiwan warning); Trump-Xi summit trade optimism and Nvidia H200 clearance creating near-term rally setup; sentiment split between ETF outflows ($635M in one day) and macro dovish pivot.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Bitcoin below $80k, Solana drops 5% on geopolitical tension; CNBC Cisco AI order surge and Nvidia clearance signal tech optimism; oil volatility (IEA flags greater volatility) adds macro uncertainty.

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CoinDesk reports Consensys delayed IPO to fall 2026; market clarity on timing and valuation roadshow appetite is immediate; Ethereum ecosystem narrative hinges on this signal.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk: Consensys delayed IPO to fall; Ethereum app builder activity; broader crypto institutional appetite tracked through concurrent Bitcoin ETF flows.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA stock outperform SPY by >15% by 2026-09-30?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Nvidia H200 sales to China reportedly cleared at Trump-Xi summit; Cisco just surged 17% on AI order strength; NVDA is litmus test for China trade optimism and AI capex continuation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC: Trump-Xi summit clears Nvidia H200; Cisco +17% on AI orders and guidance; CoinDesk: Chinese equities rally on trade optimism; oil demand cuts signal macro slowdown risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US-China bilateral trade (goods + services) grow >5% in 2026 vs 2025?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Census Bureau trade balance reports and BLS data; or World Bank bilateral trade statistics.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump-Xi summit is live; market is pricing binary 'war vs truce' but not nuanced trade flow recovery. Even partial tariff rollback or Nvidia sales resumption should lift 2026 bilateral flows measurably.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reports summit aims to 'open up' China; Nvidia H200 clearance is early signal; Burberry and luxury goods rally on China optimism suggests demand elasticity.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) close 2026 above $150 by 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap year-end closing price.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Solana dropped 5% on Xi Taiwan warning but ecosystem (Alpenglow upgrade live, Metaplanet delays show volatility appetite) is intact; AI chatbot recovery narrative (Claude helps recover BTC) hints at broader AI-crypto synergy underpriced.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Solana Alpenglow upgrade live for testing; Metaplanet delays show yen volatility but not Solana fundamentals impairment; only 4% of US voters cite crypto in candidate choice—upside surprise if institutional adoption accelerates post-Trump-Xi thaw.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will UK government bond yields (10Y Gilt) rise >25bp by 2026-06-30 as Starmer faces leadership challenge?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: UK Office for National Statistics (ONS) Gilt yield data or Bloomberg terminal settlement.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports Starmer's colleagues ready for mutiny and leadership bids; if UK government falls into political crisis, gilt yields should spike on fiscal uncertainty. Current market may be underestimating probability of early election.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Bond markets bracing for Starmer rival cover break; UK PM political turmoil is tail risk but high-impact for GBP and cross-asset volatility.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum (ETH) outperform Bitcoin (BTC) on a 6-month basis (2026-05-05 to 2026-11-05)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko ETH/BTC ratio or spot price data from major exchanges.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Consensys IPO delay to fall and Ethereum app builder activity (XbotGo AI imaging funding surge in 36Kr shows Asia institutional crypto creeping in) suggest consolidation of Ethereum narrative. Consensys IPO as catalyst could unlock relative value.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Consensys IPO delayed to fall; Chinese crypto investment (Caixin/36Kr: AI and robotics funding booming, implicit crypto infrastructure appetite); Claude AI recovery narrative ties to Ethereum L2 cost efficiency story.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US CPI (year-over-year) remain below 3.5% through 2026-12-31?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) Consumer Price Index monthly reports.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Warsh confirmation as dovish-leaning Fed chair suggests rate cuts likely; OPEC demand cuts and oil volatility (IEA flags greater volatility, OPEC cuts 2026 demand to 1.2M bpd) reduce inflation tail risk. Market may still be pricing stagflation, not disinflation.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Warsh confirmed as divisive Fed chair, likely to shift toward accommodation; oil demand downgrades; Cisco and tech AI capex surge is deflationary signal (productivity gains).

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin and risk assets rally 10-20% by 2026-07-31 as Trump-Xi trade thaw extends and Warsh signals rate-cut cycle ahead.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump-Xi summit underway with explicit goal to avoid 'Thucydides Trap'; Nvidia H200 sales cleared, signaling tech trade normalization.
CNBC: Kevin Warsh wins Fed confirmation (most divisive vote ever), widely read as dovish relative to Powell; bond market repricing likely.
CoinDesk: Bitcoin below $80k but Solana/ETH ecosystem upgrades (Alpenglow live) suggest smart-money accumulation amid short-term Xi Taiwan noise.
Cisco +17% on AI orders and job cuts shows markets rewarding productivity gains and lower cost inflation.
investment_theses.counter_view: Xi Taiwan warning triggers geopolitical escalation; Warsh surprise hawkish pivot on inflation; OPEC demand cuts signal macro slowdown and risk-off rotation.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USD spot or BTC June 2026 call options (strike $85k); pair trade: long BTC, short DXY (long BTCUSD exposure to weaker dollar from rate-cut premium).

investment_theses.thesis: NVIDIA and AI-capex tech outperform broad market by 15%+ through 2026-09-30 as China trade thaw reopens H200/H100 export ramp and Cisco-style AI order momentum sustains.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Trump-Xi summit clears Nvidia H200 sales to China, removing key regulatory bottleneck.
CNBC: Cisco stock +17% on surging AI orders and cost-cutting, signaling broad capex cycle resilience despite macro slowdown.

36Kr (Chinese source, pre-English media): XbotGo (AI imaging) raises ~100M CNY with Jiuyi Capital lead; Yuejia Power (electric aviation motor) raises tens of millions; suggests Asian institutional enthusiasm for AI/robotics capex infrastructure.
CoinDesk: Consensys IPO delay to fall 2026 suggests Ethereum ecosystem (L2 compute) remains attractive to later-stage capital.
investment_theses.counter_view: China trade thaw priced in within days; OPEC demand cuts and oil volatility trigger tech multiple compression; Warsh rate cuts lower AI capex ROI expectations.
investment_theses.expression: Long NVDA stock or NVDA call spread (short $180 call, long $200 call, 2026-09 expiry); pair trade: long NVDA vs short SOXL (tech broad) to isolate NVIDIA upside.

investment_theses.thesis: GBP/USD and UK gilt yields spike 100-150bp by 2026-06-30 as Starmer government fractures and early election becomes priced; hedge is long DXY or short GBP.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Bond markets bracing for UK PM Starmer's rivals to announce leadership bids; colleagues ready to 'mutiny'.
CNBC: Burberry (UK luxury) reports strong earnings but UK domestic retail remains fragile; political crisis would accelerate capital flight.
Broader macro: Fed (Warsh) likely to cut rates, widening USD carry premium; GBP rates staying higher will initially attract flows, but political instability flips that.
investment_theses.counter_view: Starmer holds; Labour party discipline prevails; bond market volatility is noise, not signal of real election risk.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (US dollar index) spot or DXY call options; short GBP/USD forwards; long GBP puts (2026-06 expiry, strike 1.20).

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum (ETH) outperforms Bitcoin on 6-month basis (May-November 2026) as Consensys IPO catalyst in fall unlocks Ethereum app-builder narrative and L2 cost-efficiency premium.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Consensys IPO delayed to fall 2026; roadshow and valuation discovery will reignite Ethereum-as-platform narrative.

36Kr (Chinese source): AI robotics and imaging startups (XbotGo, Yuejia Power, 羽嘉动力) raising capital at 4x+ YoY growth; suggests Asian institutional enthusiasm for infrastructure that Ethereum L2s enable (real-time settlement, minimal fees).
CoinDesk: Claude AI recovery narrative shows AI agents integrating with blockchain; Ethereum's smart-contract advantage over BTC layer-1 surfaces in app-layer competition.

Hacker News: 'Claude helps recover $395k BTC' and 'AI chatbot helps man recover 5 Bitcoin' suggest AI-crypto synergy is accelerating; Ethereum L2 (Arbitrum, Optimism) benefit from lower tx costs in high-volume scenarios.
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin dominance increases as macro hedge narrative strengthens; Consensys IPO delayed further or disappoints; Ethereum L2 scalability not materially different from L1 BTC staking yields.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio spot (or perpetual swap); long Ethereum spot, short Bitcoin spot in equal dollar terms; pair: long ETH call spreads vs short BTC call spreads (2026-06 to 2026-11 expirations).

investment_theses.thesis: DXY declines 3-5% by 2026-09-30 as Warsh Fed cuts rates faster than consensus and Trump-Xi trade thaw reduces safe-haven demand for USD, benefiting commodity currencies and crypto.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Kevin Warsh confirmed as divisive Fed chair, widely interpreted as dovish pivot from Powell; rate-cut cycle likely to accelerate vs terminal rate expectations.
CNBC: Trump-Xi summit aims for trade truce; Nvidia H200 clearance and 'open up' China rhetoric reduce geopolitical risk premium.
CoinDesk: Oil rises as IEA flags greater volatility, OPEC cuts demand; weaker dollar would offset demand destruction and support commodity prices.
Fiscal: Trump administration likely to run higher deficits (capex, defense); weak-dollar regime historically benefits Trump-era growth narratives.
investment_theses.counter_view: Xi Taiwan escalation triggers flight-to-safety bid for USD; Warsh surprises market with hawkish inflation focus; US equity rally attracts capital inflows, strengthening dollar.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY spot or DXY put options (2026-06 to 2026-09 expirations, strikes 102-105); long broad commodity index (DBC) or long gold spot (GLD); long BTC as indirect DXY hedge.
